title: BleachAwakenedAddon
description:
An Addon for the mod Bleach-Awaken
Requires Bleach-Awaken
Requires Pehkui
body:
Must download Bleach-Awaken for this to work

Fixes Hollow Race Rendering, Arrancar Mask Rendering
Fixes Soul Society Lighting

Fixes Heuco Lighting
Adds Quincy Dimension
Edited Kisuke Shop UI to allow for buying new items
Added ChooseRace gamerule which if false will lock the race selection to random
Added SpawnBleachStructures gamerule which if false disables the bleach buildings (this is normally for servers as the structures cause lag)
